persona.name: Routine Rachel
persona.description: Already into wellness but wants to simplify. Currently takes a greens powder, separate protein, multivitamin, and probiotic. Knows what she wants but is overwhelmed by the complexity. She's looking for one thing that covers it all.

demographics.lifestyle: Active, does yoga or light fitness, meal preps sometimes, follows wellness creators

pain_points: Morning supplement routine takes too long (5 different things)
Cabinet full of half-used supplement bottles
Wants plant-based but protein powders taste awful
Decision fatigue from too many options
what_converts_her: The simplicity angle (one scoop replaces everything)
Cost comparison (this vs her current stack)
persona.content_consumption: Engages with wellness content, saves recipes, follows routine-style content. Likes 'what I eat in a day' formats

ad_character_match.should_look_like: Slightly younger, more 'wellness-adjacent'. Someone who clearly takes care of themselves but isn't obsessive. Athleisure at home. Cleaner kitchen but still real
ad_character_match.should_NOT_look_like: Gym bro, hardcore fitness, too polished, or too messy
